reference: Hi, I have a habit of ejaculating once every three days, and I am experiencing a loss of eyesight. I wear glasses, but my eyesight is deteriorating day by day. I would like to ask you if there is any connection between masturbation and losing eyesight.
text: Hi, I have a habit of ejaculating one seven three days, and I am experiencing the loss of eyesight. I wear glasses, but my eyesight is deteriorating day by day. I would like to ask you if there is any connection between masturbation and losing eyesight.
